name: How long until my occupational illness claim is settled in Ogden?

mainEntity.name: How long until my occupational illness claim is settled in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.description: 3-12 months typically; faster if undisputed, longer with appeals.[1] Utah process: file, investigate, hearing if needed.[1] Key factors: (1) evidence strength; (2) insurer cooperation; (3) IME delays. Push for mediation. Track status weekly. Lawyer speeds resolution.
